name: adipoli-v1-02-remotion-proof
description: Remotion long-form master for the M1L1 Remotion + HyperFrames trial.

scripts.compositions: npm run stage && npx remotion compositions src/index.ts --public-dir=public
scripts.still: npm run stage && npx remotion still src/index.ts V1M1L1Proof output/v1-m1-l1-proof.png --frame=1650 --public-dir=public
scripts.render: npm run stage && npx remotion render src/index.ts V1M1L1Proof output/v1-m1-l1-proof.mp4 --public-dir=public --codec=h264 --crf=18 --concurrency=2
